variants.title: HiFi Filter SH 51209 Special Filter | Replaces the Filtrec WT1755
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter SH 51209 Special Filter | Replaces the Filtrec WT1755
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SH 51209 Hydraulic Filter. Engineered to protect and optimize the performance of hydraulic systems, this filter delivers exceptional contamination control. Premium filter media captures fine particles and debris that could compromise system integrity, helping to extend the lifespan of critical hydraulic components. By maintaining fluid cleanliness, it reduces wear and tear while supporting consistent pressure levels throughout the system. Perfect for a wide range of hydraulic applications—from industrial machinery to heavy-duty equipment—this filter provides reliable performance even under high-pressure conditions. Its robust construction ensures long-lasting durability, helping to minimize downtime and maintenance costs while maximizing operational efficiency.
specifications: Style: Special Filter, Outer Diameter: 70.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 57.0 mm, Length: 224.0 mm, Temperature Range: -25 - +120°C, Flow Direction: OUT-IN

variants.title: Filtrec WT1755 Special Filter
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec WT1755. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the WT1755 provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Special Filter, Outer Diameter: 70.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 57.0 mm, Length: 224.0 mm, Temperature Range: -25 - +120°C, Flow Direction: OUT-IN
